title: More Block Predicates
description: Allows resource packs to change block models depending on new conditions!
body:
### Summary:
More Block Predicates, or MBP, allows resource pack creators to change which models blocks will use, depending on many new conditions! Some conditions include, biome, position, light level, and more!
**Also compatible with sodium!**

### Usage:
Documentation (WIP) can be found: [here](https://github.com/omoflop/MoreBlockPredicates/wiki)
